rewind.confirmMessage: Rewind to this point? File changes after this message will be reverted. Rewinding does not affect files edited manually or via bash.
rewind.noticeSaveFailed: Rewound: {count} file(s) reverted, but failed to save state: {error}
rewind.errorProviderNotSupported: Rewind is not supported by this provider.

fork.unavailableNoResponse: Cannot fork: no response to fork from
fork.commandNoMessages: Cannot fork: no messages in conversation
fork.commandNoAssistantUuid: Cannot fork: no assistant response with identifiers

fileDrop.overlay: Drop file here to add to context

askQuestion.hintsNavigate: Enter to select · Tab/Arrow keys to navigate · Esc to cancel
askQuestion.hintsImmediate: Enter to select · Arrow keys to navigate · Esc to cancel
askQuestion.hintsPlanNav: Arrow keys to navigate · Enter to select · Esc to cancel

plan.readError: Could not read plan file: {error}. "Approve (new session)" will not include plan details.

subagent.ariaBackgroundInitializing: Background task: {description} — Initializing — click to expand
subagent.ariaTask: Subagent task: {description} — {count} tool uses — Status: {status} — click to expand

externalContext.duplicateFolder: This folder is already added as an external context.
externalContext.persistFailed: Cannot persist "{path}" - directory no longer exists
externalContext.conflictParent: Cannot add "{newPath}" - it's inside existing path "{existingPath}"
externalContext.conflictChild: Cannot add "{newPath}" - it contains existing path "{existingPath}"

notices.cannotSwitchProviderBound: Cannot switch provider on a bound session. Start a new tab instead.
notices.forkNotSupportedProvider: Fork is not supported by this provider.
notices.imageAttachmentsNotSupported: Image attachments are not supported by this provider.
notices.agentInitFailed: Failed to initialize agent service. Please try again.
notices.agentServiceUnavailable: Agent service not available. Please reload the plugin.
notices.steerCodexQueuedFailed: Failed to steer the queued Codex message. It is still available.
notices.instructionAddedToSystemPrompt: Instruction added to custom system prompt
notices.slashNotSupportedByProvider: /{name} is not supported by this provider.
notices.backgroundTaskRenderFailed: Background task completed, but the result could not be rendered.
notices.inlineEditNoEditor: Inline edit unavailable: could not access the active editor. Try reopening the note.
notices.inlineEditVaultLoadFailed: Failed to load vault files. Vault @-mentions may be unavailable.
notices.inlineEditAttachInvalidPath: Failed to attach file: invalid path
notices.pluginMalformedEntry: Claudian: plugin "{id}" has malformed entry in installed_plugins.json (expected array, got {type})
notices.inlineEditNoMarkdownView: Inline edit unavailable: could not access the active markdown view.
notices.envPartialTabRestart: Environment changes applied, but {count} affected tab(s) failed to restart.
notices.envAppliedRebuild: Environment variables applied. Sessions will be rebuilt on next message.

userName.name: What should Claudian call you?
userName.desc: Your name for personalized greetings (leave empty for generic greetings)

agentName.name: Agent display name
agentName.desc: Name shown beside the logo in the top-left of the chat. Leave empty to use "Claudian".

excludedTags.name: Excluded tags
excludedTags.desc: Notes with these tags will not auto-load as context (one per line, without #)

mediaFolder.name: Media folder
mediaFolder.desc: Folder containing attachments/images. When notes use ![[image.jpg]], Claude will look here. Leave empty for vault root.

systemPrompt.name: Custom system prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Additional instructions appended to the default system prompt

autoTitle.name: Auto-generate conversation titles
autoTitle.desc: Automatically generate conversation titles after the first user message is sent.

titleModel.name: Title generation model
titleModel.desc: Model used for auto-generating conversation titles.

navMappings.name: Vim-style navigation mappings
navMappings.desc: One mapping per line. Format: "map <key> <action>" (actions: scrollUp, scrollDown, focusInput).

slashCommands.name: Commands and Skills
slashCommands.desc: Manage vault-level commands and skills stored in .claude/commands/ and .claude/skills/. Triggered by /name.

hiddenSlashCommands.name: Hidden Commands
hiddenSlashCommands.desc: Hide specific slash commands from the dropdown. Useful for hiding Claude Code commands that are not relevant to Claudian. Enter command names without the leading slash, one per line.

mcpServers.name: MCP Servers
mcpServers.desc: Manage vault-level MCP server configurations stored in .claude/mcp.json. Servers with context-saving mode require @mention to activate.

plugins.name: Claude Code Plugins
plugins.desc: Manage Claude Code plugins discovered from ~/.claude/plugins. Enabled plugins are stored per vault in .claude/settings.json.

subagents.name: Subagents
subagents.desc: Manage vault-level subagents stored in .claude/agents/. Each Markdown file defines one custom agent.
subagents.noAgents: No subagents configured. Click + to create one.
subagents.renameCleanupFailed: Warning: could not remove old file for "{name}"

modal.name: Name
modal.nameDesc: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Reviews code for bugs and style
modal.toolsDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed tools (empty = all)
modal.disallowedToolsDesc: Comma-separated list of tools to disallow
modal.promptPlaceholder: You are a code reviewer. Analyze the given code for...

loadUserSettings.name: Load user Claude settings
loadUserSettings.desc: Load ~/.claude/settings.json. When enabled, user's Claude Code permission rules may bypass Safe mode.

claudeSafeMode.name: Safe mode
claudeSafeMode.desc: Permission mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

codexSafeMode.name: Safe mode
codexSafeMode.desc: Sandbox mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

claudeEnv.desc: Claude-owned runtime variables only. Use this for ANTHROPIC_* and Claude-specific toggles.

customVariables.name: Custom variables
customVariables.desc: Environment variables for Claude SDK (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

envSnippets.name: Snippets
envSnippets.noSnippets: No saved environment snippets yet. Click + to save your current environment configuration.
envSnippets.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the snippet

modal.name: Name
modal.namePlaceholder: A descriptive name for this environment configuration
modal.envVarsPlaceholder: KEY=VALUE format, one per line (export prefix supported)

customContextLimits.name: Custom Context Limits
customContextLimits.desc: Set context window sizes for your custom models. Leave empty to use the default (200k tokens).
customContextLimits.invalid: Invalid format. Use: 256k, 1m, or exact count (1000-10000000).

enableOpus1M.name: Opus 1M context window
enableOpus1M.desc: Show Opus 1M in the model selector. Included with Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. API and Pro users need extra usage.

enableSonnet1M.name: Sonnet 1M context window
enableSonnet1M.desc: Show Sonnet 1M in the model selector. Requires extra usage on Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. API and Pro users need extra usage.

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Claude model IDs to the picker, one per line. Environment model overrides still replace the picker.

enableChrome.name: Enable Chrome extension
enableChrome.desc: Allow Claude to interact with Chrome via the claude-in-chrome extension. Requires the extension to be installed. Requires session restart.

enableBangBash.name: Enable bash mode (!)
enableBangBash.desc: Type ! on empty input to enter bash mode. Runs commands directly via Node.js child_process. Requires view reopen.

validation.noNode: Node.js not found on PATH. Install Node.js or check your PATH configuration.

maxTabs.name: Maximum chat tabs
maxTabs.desc: Maximum number of concurrent chat tabs (3-10). Each tab uses a separate Claude session.
maxTabs.warning: More than 5 tabs may impact performance and memory usage.

tabBarPosition.name: Tab bar position
tabBarPosition.desc: Choose where to display tab badges and action buttons

enableAutoScroll.name: Auto-scroll during streaming
enableAutoScroll.desc: Automatically scroll to the bottom as Claude streams responses. Disable to stay at the top and read from the beginning.

openInMainTab.name: Open in main editor area
openInMainTab.desc: Open chat panel as a main tab in the center editor area instead of the right sidebar

cliPath.name: Claude CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to Claude Code CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection.
cliPath.descWindows: For the native installer, use claude.exe. For npm/pnpm/yarn or other package manager installs, use the cli.js path (not claude.cmd).
cliPath.descUnix: Paste the output of "which claude" — works for both native and npm/pnpm/yarn installs.

validation.isDirectory: Path is a directory, not a file

language.name: Language
language.desc: Change the display language of the plugin interface

contextSaving.name: Context-saving mode
contextSaving.desc: Hide tools from agent unless @-mentioned (saves context window)

validation.nameInvalid: Server name can only contain letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores

mcpTest.noToolsHint: No tools information available. Tools will be loaded when used in chat.
mcpTest.toggleErrorDiskFull: Disk full. Free up space and try again.

mcpList.empty: No MCP servers configured. Click "Add" to add one.
mcpList.noticeReloadFailed: Setting saved but reload failed. Changes will apply on next session.
mcpList.clipboardInvalid: No valid MCP configuration found in clipboard
mcpList.clipboardNamePrompt: Enter a name for the server

slashCommandModal.modelOverrideDesc: Optional model to use for this command
slashCommandModal.allowedToolsDesc: Comma-separated list of tools to allow (empty = all)
slashCommandModal.disableModelInvocationDesc: Prevent the model from invoking this command itself
slashCommandModal.disableUserInvocationDesc: Prevent the user from invoking this skill directly
slashCommandModal.agentDesc: Subagent type when context is fork
slashCommandModal.emptyList: No commands or skills configured. Click + to create one.

providerEnabled.name: Enable Codex provider
providerEnabled.desc: When enabled, Codex models appear in the model selector for new conversations. Existing Codex sessions are preserved.

installationMethod.name: Installation method
installationMethod.desc: How Claudian should launch Codex on Windows. Native Windows uses a Windows executable path. WSL launches the Linux CLI inside a selected distro.

cliPath.name: Codex CLI path ({host})
cliPath.descGeneric: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection from PATH.
cliPath.descWsl: Linux-side Codex command or absolute path to run inside WSL. Leave empty for PATH lookup inside the selected distro.
cliPath.descWindowsNative: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection from PATH. Use the native Windows executable path, usually `codex.exe`.

cliPathValidation.wslExpectsLinuxPath: WSL mode expects a Linux command or Linux absolute path, not a Windows executable path.

wslDistro.name: WSL distro override
wslDistro.desc: Optional advanced override. Leave empty to infer the distro from a \\wsl$ workspace path when possible, otherwise use the default WSL distro.

reasoningSummary.name: Reasoning summary
reasoningSummary.desc: Show a summary of the model's reasoning process in the thinking block.

skillsSection.heading: Codex Skills
skillsSection.desc: Manage vault-level Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ or .agents/skills/. Home-level skills are excluded here.

hiddenSkills.name: Hidden Skills
hiddenSkills.desc: Hide specific Codex skills from the dropdown. Enter skill names without the leading $, one per line.

subagentsSection.heading: Codex Subagents
subagentsSection.desc: Manage vault-level Codex subagents stored in .codex/agents/. Each TOML file defines one custom agent.

mcpNotice.beforeCmd: Codex manages MCP servers via its own CLI. Configure with
mcpNotice.afterCmd: and they will be available in Claudian.

env.name: Codex environment
env.desc: Codex-owned runtime variables only. Use this for OPENAI_* and CODEX_* settings. If Codex auto-detection needs help, add its install directory to shared PATH instead of this provider section.

pluginsUi.empty: No Claude Code plugins found. Enable plugins via the Claude CLI.
pluginsUi.noticeTogglePartialFail: Plugin toggled, but some tabs failed to restart.

codexSkills.empty: No Codex skills in vault. Click + to create one.

codexSubagents.empty: No Codex subagents in vault. Click + to create one.

name.name: Name
name.desc: Agent name Codex uses when spawning (lowercase, hyphens, underscores)

description.name: Description
description.desc: When Codex should use this agent
description.placeholder: Reviews code for correctness and security

nicknameCandidates.name: Nickname candidates
nicknameCandidates.desc: Comma-separated display nicknames (e.g., Atlas, Delta, Echo)

developerInstructions.name: Developer instructions
developerInstructions.desc: Core instructions that define the agent's behavior
developerInstructions.placeholder:
Review code like an owner.
Prioritize correctness, security, and missing test coverage.

validation.nameTooLong: Subagent name must be {max} characters or fewer
validation.nameInvalidChars: Subagent name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
validation.nicknameInvalidChars: Nickname candidates can only contain ASCII letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores
